form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming second last in a small field at Wolverhampton on March 2 over 1400m, 1.75 len behind Pints In Peace with 56kg at $8. Second run from a spell ran last of 9 at Kempton Park All Weather on March 25 over 1600m, 6 len behind Blues And Royals carrying 60kg at $12. Not keen on his chances.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation winning by 1.3 len Southwell All Weather October 31 over 1600m defeating Thanh Nam with 61kg at $4. On debut seventh of 9 at Newbury August 15 over 1200m, 10 len behind Slay Queen carrying 58kg at $51. Has ability and worth following.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently 3rd of 7 at Wolverhampton on March 30 over 1900m, 3 len behind Lux Aeterna with 61kg at $3.50. Before that won by 0.5 len at Wolverhampton March 13 over 1900m defeating Lapidarist with 64kg at $1.70. Cannot be underestimated.

form.formComment: Most recently ran last of 10 at Kempton Park All Weather on April 1 over 1200m, 15 len behind Arry Up carrying 59kg at $21. Before that ran last of 8 at this track on January 29 over 1200m, 53 len behind Bucklow Hill with 60.5kg at $11. Makes no appeal.

form.formComment: Resuming after a 12 weeks break. Not seen since winning to post a big 5.5 len win. Southwell All Weather January 23 over 1600m defeating Karakula Dancer with 59.5kg at $2.40. On debut ran last of 13 at Dundalk All Weather November 7 over 1609m, 14 len behind Manton Bay carrying 59.5kg at $29. Rates highly and is among the leading hopes.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 5th of 9 at Chelmsford on February 26 over 1600m, 8 len behind Felix Gem with 53.5kg at $81. Last start 5th of 8 at this track on March 20 over 1600m, 9 len behind Politely with 56.5kg at $29. Likely to struggle.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Denied a clear run turning into the home straight.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start 2nd of 7 at Wolverhampton on March 30 over 1900m, 2.75 len behind Lux Aeterna with 55.5kg at $15. The start before that 2nd of 11 at Wolverhampton on March 9 over 1700m, 1.0 len behind Crimson Rambler with 59kg at $34. Should hold the form and she appeals as one of the hardest to beat.
